title: Centre Supervisor (West, Day Care, Office Hours, 5 days) - HWX
description:
• Perform intake assessment and review of day care clients and oversee Multi- Disciplinary Meetings for reviews of clients including Day Rehab clients.
  • Supervise daily routines such as meal preparation, serving of meals, preparing clients for activities, conducting of activities, reviews of clients and cleaning duties of care staff.
  • Work with centre nurse and care staff to ensure clients specific needs (ADLs) are met and
  • communicated to the team.
  • Co-ordinate and plan programmes and services with internal and external stakeholders.
  • Direct, guide and participate in the orientation and training of new staff and provide ongoing training and monitoring of care staff in the area of provision of care to day care clients and clients with dementia.
  • Take charge of daily operations, and care provisions of clients, supervise and deploy staff to ensure operations of centre is safe and effective.
  • Take charge of incidents in the centre related to staff, clients and volunteers to ensure that the incident is resolved, reported and follow-up.
  • Work with Centralised Team to ensure accurate billing and charges for clients and follow up on staff related matters.
  • Work with Cluster Lead to ensure financial sustainability of the centre.
  • Ensure accurate and timely documentation of communications, assessment and processes
  • Carry out other responsibilities and duties as assigned from time to time

Requirements:

  • min. Degree in any relevant disciplines and above
  • Possess min. 5 years prior working experience in operations role, preferably in healthcare
  • Excellent interpersonal and communication skills
  • Team player and able to work independently as well

Interested candidates please send your updated resume in MS Word Format:

kate.leau@recruitexpress.com.sg
Subject: Centre Supervisor

EA Personnel: Kate Leau Wei Xuan (R1552331)
Company Registration No.: 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
